response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled full-stack and web developer with over a decade of experience primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he lacks the core qualifications for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments and a bachelor-thesis project, with no indication of sustained Windows-platform C++ work. He has no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain experience — his closest brush is RIDE Capital, a retail investment fintech using Node/GraphQL, which is unrelated to capital-markets infrastructure. SQL Server and Oracle are entirely absent from his profile.
strengths: Polyglot background with a proven ability to adopt new languages and environments quickly across a wide range of domains
Hands-on CI/CD and DevOps experience (GitLab CI, Docker, Artifactory) satisfies one of the optional desirable skills
Brief C and C++ work at National Instruments demonstrates at least foundational familiarity with the language
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months professionally) and far below the mandatory 5–10 year Windows-platform requirement
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge; no financial-product exposure of any kind
SQL experience is generic and superficial; no SQL Server or Oracle proficiency is demonstrated
